meta.source_file: Ares CLO XV - Final Offering Circular dated 14 December 2021.pdf
meta.issuer: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
meta.version_notes: v2 corrections vs v1: (1) §10(a)(iv) reclassified from pure OC_PAR to hybrid compositional numerator; (2) missing Principal Waterfall clause (H) — Class D Coverage Tests cure — restored; waterfall clause count corrected 21→22; (3) Target Par Amount is an explicit OC Condition 1 definition (€500M), not derived; (4) Frequency Switch Event trigger mechanics added in full.

section_1_deal_identity.legal_name: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
section_1_deal_identity.entity_form: Designated activity company limited by shares
section_1_deal_identity.registered_office: 3rd Floor Kilmore House, Park Lane, Spencer Dock, Dublin 1, Ireland
section_1_deal_identity.volcker_status: Covered fund (does not qualify for loan securitisation exclusion)
section_1_deal_identity.listing: Irish Stock Exchange (Global Exchange Market) — Rated Notes only

transaction_parties.entity: Ares European CLO XV Designated Activity Company
Ares European Loan Funding II Limited
BNY Mellon Corporate Trustee Services Limited
The Bank of New York Mellon SA/NV, Dublin Branch
The Bank of New York Mellon SA/NV, Dublin Branch

section_2_key_dates.payment_dates_post_freq_switch: 15-Jan/15-Jul OR 15-Apr/15-Oct — keyed to the prior Payment Date's month
section_2_key_dates.due_period_definition: Day after prior Determination Date to Business Day before next Determination Date

tranches.note: Pari passu with B-1 in payment priority

par_value_tests.denominator_description: Aggregate par of Classes A + B-1 + B-2

interest_coverage_tests.denominator_description: Per Condition 1 definition; scheduled interest less senior expenses

reinvestment_oc_test.trigger_action: Interest diversion (lesser of 50% of residual IP or cure amount) during Reinvestment Period

numerator_components.description: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Collateral Obligations other than Defaulted Obligations
For each Defaulted Obligation: Market Value × Principal Balance (MV × PB)
Principal Proceeds standing to the credit of the Principal Account on the Measurement Date

event_of_default_par_value_test.denominator_description: Principal Amount Outstanding of the Class A Notes only
event_of_default_par_value_test.behaviour_when_defaults_zero: Component (2) = 0; numerator collapses to APB(non-defaulted) + Principal Proceeds = Adjusted CPA; test behaves identically to a Class-A-denominator OC_PAR
event_of_default_par_value_test.behaviour_with_defaults: MV component activates — defaulted par is effectively replaced by recovery-adjusted market value
event_of_default_par_value_test.downstream_modelling_note: Single testType=OC_PAR will mis-compute the ratio in any default scenario; must represent components (1), (2), (3) compositionally

fees.name: Senior Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: % per annum of Collateral Principal Amount

fees.name: Subordinated Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: % per annum of Collateral Principal Amount

fees.name: Incentive Collateral Management Fee
fees.basis: 20% of residual Interest/Principal Proceeds otherwise distributable to Sub Notes

fees.name: Administrative Expenses
fees.basis: Subject to Senior Expenses Cap; includes Collateral Administrator, Custodian, Calculation Agent, Securitisation Transparency Reporting

incentive_fee_irr_threshold.measurement_basis: IRR of Subordinated Notes Outstanding on the Principal Amount Outstanding of the Subordinated Notes as of the first day of the Due Period preceding the Payment Date, after giving effect to all payments on such Payment Date
incentive_fee_irr_threshold.effect_on_meeting: CM receives 20% of any Interest/Principal Proceeds that would otherwise flow to Sub Noteholders
incentive_fee_irr_threshold.current_status_as_of_2026_04_15: Not reached; no incentive fee paid in current period per trustee report

clauses.application: Issuer taxes (i) + Issuer Profit Amount (ii)
Trustee Fees & Expenses — subject to Senior Expenses Cap
Administrative Expenses — subject to Senior Expenses Cap
Top-up of Expense Reserve Account — Senior Expenses Cap headroom
Senior Collateral Management Fee + VAT (current, then past due)
Scheduled Periodic Hedge Payments + Currency/Interest Rate Hedge Termination Payments (non-defaulted); Hedge Replacement Payments
Class A Interest Amounts
Class B-1 & B-2 Interest Amounts (pro rata, pari passu)
Redemption to cure Class A/B Coverage Tests (per Note Payment Sequence)
Class C Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
Class C Deferred Interest (per Condition 6(c))
Redemption to cure Class C Coverage Tests
Class D Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
Class D Deferred Interest
Redemption to cure Class D Coverage Tests
Class E Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
Class E Deferred Interest
Redemption to cure Class E Par Value Test
Class F Interest Amounts (current, ex Deferred Interest)
Class F Deferred Interest
Redemption to cure Class F Par Value Test
Redemption on Effective Date Rating Event (if continuing)
Reinvestment OC Test cure: lesser of 50% of remaining IP, or amount to meet 103.74%, at CM discretion — reinvest or repay Rated Notes
Sub Collateral Management Fee + VAT (current, then past due); then CM Advances + interest thereon
Trustee Fees & Expenses not paid under cap
Administrative Expenses not paid under cap
Defaulted Currency/IR Hedge Termination Payments (pari passu, pro rata)
Supplemental Reserve Account deposit (during Reinvestment Period, CM discretion)
Incentive Collateral Management Fee (IF IRR Threshold met: 20% of remaining IP) + VAT
All remaining Interest Proceeds → Subordinated Notes (pro rata)
Sequential backfill of unpaid Interest waterfall items (A)–(H)
Backfill of Interest item (I) to extent needed for Class A/B Coverage Tests
Backfill of Interest item (J) to extent Class C Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (K) to extent Class C Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (L) to extent needed for Class C Coverage Tests
Backfill of Interest item (M) to extent Class D Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (N) to extent Class D Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (O) to extent needed for Class D Coverage Tests
clauses.v2_note: Restored in v2 — was missing in v1

clauses.application: Backfill of Interest item (P) to extent Class E Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (Q) to extent Class E Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (R) to extent needed for Class E Par Value Test
Backfill of Interest item (S) to extent Class F Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (T) to extent Class F Notes are Controlling Class
Backfill of Interest item (U) to extent needed for Class F Par Value Test
Backfill of Interest item (V) — Effective Date Rating Event
Special Redemption Amount (CM election on Special Redemption Date)

Reinvestment/Substitute Collateral — (1) during Reinvestment Period: purchase Substitute Collateral or hold in Principal Account at CM discretion; (2) post-Reinvestment: reinvestment of Unscheduled Proceeds + Credit Improved/Credit Risk sale proceeds at CM discretion
After Reinvestment Period: redeem Notes per Note Payment Sequence
After Reinvestment Period: sequential backfill of Interest items (W)–(Z)
Reinvesting Noteholder Reinvestment Amounts (sub notes)
Incentive Collateral Management Fee (IF IRR Threshold met) + VAT
All remaining Principal Proceeds → Subordinated Notes (principal first, then interest, pro rata)

post_acceleration_priority_of_payments.trigger: Delivery of an Acceleration Notice not rescinded
post_acceleration_priority_of_payments.mechanics: Interest and Principal Proceeds are combined and applied sequentially
post_acceleration_priority_of_payments.sequence_summary: (A) taxes + profit → (B) trustee fees uncapped → (C) admin expenses uncapped → (D) senior mgmt fee → (E) hedge periodic/termination (non-defaulted) → (F) Class A P+I → (G) Class B P+I pari passu → (H) Class C I+P sequential → … → (Q) Sub mgmt fee → (T) hedge defaulted termination → (V) incentive fee if IRR met → (W) residual to Sub Noteholders

conventions.reference_rate_initial_period: Linear interpolation of 6-month and 12-month EURIBOR (Issue Date to 15-Jul-2022 only)
conventions.reference_rate_determination: Interest Determination Date (2 Business Days before Accrual Period start) at 11:00 a.m. Brussels
conventions.euribor_cessation_fallback: Condition 6(e)(i)(B)–(C): Reference Banks polled; alternative benchmarks invoked if primary screen rate unavailable

class_a.note: Non-payment beyond 5 BDs (7 BDs if error/omission) is a Note Event of Default per Condition 6 & 10(a)(i)

class_b.note: Non-payment beyond 5 BDs (7 BDs if error/omission) is a Note Event of Default

class_c.mechanics: Accrues as Deferred Interest; added to Principal Amount Outstanding; thereafter accrues interest at applicable Class rate

class_d.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

class_e.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

class_f.mechanics: Same as Class C per Condition 6(c)

subordinated_notes.mechanics: No stated coupon; residual distribution only via Interest waterfall (DD), Principal waterfall (V), Post-Accel waterfall (W); non-payment due to insufficient IP/PP is not a Note Event of Default

frequency_switch_event.trigger_logic: Either (a) CM discretion OR both (b) and (c) below (while any Class A Notes outstanding)
frequency_switch_event.trigger_a_cm_discretion: The Collateral Manager declares in its sole discretion that a Frequency Switch Event has occurred

trigger_b_concentration_test.metric: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Frequency Switch Obligations (excluding Defaulted Obligations) ÷ Collateral Principal Amount (excluding Defaulted Obligations)

trigger_c_interest_shortfall_test.numerator: (A) scheduled and projected interest on Collateral Obligations during the next Due Period + (B) Interest Smoothing Account balance
trigger_c_interest_shortfall_test.denominator: Scheduled payments for Interest Priority of Payments paragraphs (A)–(I) on the second Payment Date following the Measurement Date

frequency_switch_event.measurement_dates: Each Determination Date from (and including) the Determination Date immediately preceding the second Payment Date
effects_on_trigger: Payment Dates switch from quarterly to semi-annual keyed to the prior Payment Date month (15-Jan/15-Jul if last quarterly was Jan/Jul; 15-Apr/15-Oct if last quarterly was Apr/Oct)
Reference rate for all FRN tranches moves from 3-month to 6-month EURIBOR
Issuer Profit Amount steps from €250 to €500 per period
frequency_switch_event.status_as_of_2026_04_01: No Frequency Switch Event has occurred. Deal continues on quarterly payments and 3-month EURIBOR.

worked_example_class_a_15apr2026.tie_out: Matches 15-Apr-2026 Payment Date Report figure exactly

portfolio_profile_limits_selected.bucket: Obligors in countries with Fitch country ceiling < AAA

collateral_quality_tests.description: Applicable only while Fitch-rated Notes outstanding; elected case from Fitch Test Matrix

collateral_quality_tests.test: Fitch Minimum WA Recovery Rate Test
collateral_quality_tests.description: Applicable only while Fitch-rated Notes outstanding; recovery rate per Fitch methodology
Elected case from Moody's Test Matrix (row = Min WAS, column = Min Diversity Score)

collateral_quality_tests.test: Moody's Minimum WA Recovery Rate Test
collateral_quality_tests.description: 43.5% minus WARF Adjustment; WARF Adjustment scales with WAS bucket
Elected case from Matrix — Min Diversity score parameter (28 to 72 in steps of 2)
Elected case from Matrix row (2.20% to 5.80%); Floating WAS plus Excess WAC
WAL not exceeding specified year target; key forward-looking test as Reinvestment ends

moodys_test_matrix_sample.election_mechanics: CM elects an operating point on the Effective Date and may change election with 10 BDs notice to Trustee and Moody's, subject to Minimum Spread, Diversity, WARF and Recovery Rate tests being satisfied (or closer to satisfied) post-move

fitch_test_matrix.note: Full Fitch matrix not transcribed in condensed form — structure differs from Moody's (different row/column axes)

scenarios.mechanics: CM Voting Noteholders (simple majority of CM-Voting Class A) may remove the Collateral Manager upon a CM Termination Event
scenarios.note: Rated Notes held by CM or Related Persons may only be CM Non-Voting Exchangeable Notes and are excluded from the vote

scenarios.mechanics: Requires Ordinary Resolution of (a) CM Voting Noteholders of Class A AND (b) Subordinated Noteholders (each acting separately)
scenarios.note: Subject to no CM Termination Event having occurred and continuing; CM may not be removed without cause during the Non-Call Period

scenarios.mechanics: Successor CM appointed by (a) CM Voting Noteholders of Class A Ordinary Resolution AND (b) Subordinated Noteholders Ordinary Resolution, subject to Rating Agency Confirmation
scenarios.note: Successor must satisfy CM eligibility requirements (regulatory status, experience, AUM thresholds)

scenarios.mechanics: CM may resign on 60 days' written notice; effective only upon successor appointment
scenarios.note: Issuer may terminate if no successor appointed within 120 days of notice

cm_voting_note_exchange.scope_of_governance_votes: Only Class A Notes participate; Classes B through F do not participate in CM governance votes
cm_voting_note_exchange.cm_related_party_restriction: Any Rated Notes held by the Collateral Manager or any CM Related Person may only be held as CM Non-Voting Exchangeable Notes — excludes CM from votes on its own replacement

section_10_extraction_notes.detail: All 8 tranches transcribed with exact principal amounts, spreads, issue prices, maturity dates, and rating agency assignments. Cross-checked against 15-Apr-2026 Payment Date Report tranche table — matches exactly.

All PV (5) + IC (3) + Reinvestment OC (1) + Event of Default PV (1, hybrid numerator) triggers transcribed. Denominator descriptions cross-verified against compliance report §IV — all five PV denominators reconcile.

Explicitly transcribed from OC Condition 10(a)(iv) (pp. 207–208). Hybrid numerator = (1) non-defaulted APB + (2) Σ(MV × PB) for defaulted + (3) Principal Proceeds; denominator is Class A PAO. Not pure OC_PAR. Compositional representation required for default-scenario modelling.
12.0% per annum confirmed on PDF page 146 (definition of Incentive Collateral Management Fee IRR Threshold).
Senior 0.15% and Sub 0.35% p.a. confirmed — total stated mgmt 0.50% p.a. of CPA. Incentive 20% split above IRR threshold. All excl. of VAT.

30 Interest Priority clauses (A–DD) and 22 Principal Priority clauses (A–V, no skipped letters). Principal clause (H) — Class D Coverage Tests cure — restored in v2; clause count corrected from 21 to 22.

Day count (Actual/360 float, 30/360 fixed), reference rate, floor (zero), deferral (C/D/E/F), Sub Note residual mechanics all captured. Worked example tie-out: 2.96600% × 310M × 90/360 = €2,298,650 matches 15-Apr-2026 payment exactly.
Full trigger mechanics transcribed (§7.2). Two-prong automatic test (20% concentration AND <120% forward coverage) OR CM discretion. One-time irreversible.
Full Fitch matrix (PDF pp. 311–312) not transcribed. Current elected operating point captured (Fitch Max WARF 28.00, Fitch Min WA Recovery 57.15%).
Corner sample points shown (7 rows × 4 columns = 28 cells from ~460-cell matrix). Election changes require 10 BDs' notice to Trustee and Moody's.
27 headline limits shown. Full 63-item Portfolio Profile enumerated in condensed Compliance Report §VII with current-period values.
Full Eligibility Criteria list (PDF pp. 23–27 and Annex refs) defines per-asset qualification rules. Reference OC directly for acquisition-eligibility decisioning.

Currency Hedge Transactions required for all Non-Euro Obligations (subject to Hedging Condition and Rating Agency Confirmation). No hedges currently active as of 01-Apr-2026 (all positions EUR-denominated).
Not material for cashflow modelling; retrievable from Rating Agency rating letters or Issuer registration detail.

Condition 1 Index of Defined Terms spans PDF pp. 390–397. Key definitions referenced: Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount, Aggregate Principal Balance, Collateral Principal Amount, Due Period, Frequency Switch Event, Interest Coverage Amount, Moody's WARF Adjustment, Senior Expenses Cap.

All inputs required to reconstruct (i) waterfall in any period, (ii) coverage tests including hybrid §10(a)(iv), (iii) incentive fee trigger, (iv) per-tranche cash distributions, and (v) Frequency Switch Event transition are captured in combination with condensed Compliance Report. Reinvestment Period dynamics and forward-rate paths require external model inputs (e.g., Intex assumption set) outside PPM scope.

changes: §10(a)(iv) reclassified from pure OC_PAR to hybrid compositional numerator
Missing Principal Waterfall clause (H) — Class D Coverage Tests cure — restored; waterfall clause count corrected 21 → 22
Target Par Amount prose corrected — €500M is explicit OC Condition 1 definition, not derived from tranche sum less sub discount
Frequency Switch Event trigger mechanics (§7.2) added in full per OC Condition 1 definition
section_11_changelog.verification: All four corrections verified against full 418-page Offering Circular dated 14 December 2021
